task: Repository maintenance — bring CHANGELOG / RELEASE / acceptance / docs version headers up to date with the v0.4.22 release
summary:
Chairman: '根据检查的问题继续维护仓库'. Five issues surfaced from a state-of-the-repo audit:

1. CHANGELOG.md topped out at v0.4.0 (2026-06-25) but the
   product line is now at v0.4.22 (2026-07-02). 19 patch
   versions (0.4.1 .. 0.4.22) had no changelog entries —
   confusing for the chairman (or anyone reviewing the
   repo) who reads the changelog and sees v0.4.0 as the
   current release. Wrote a [0.4.22] section that
   summarises the cumulative Added / Changed / Fixed
   surface across all 19 patch versions, drawing from
   the .nwt/timeline/000060 .. 000078 events + the
   event 000068 / 000069 / 000075 / 000077 / 000078
   diffs.

2. RELEASE_v0.4.md (the v0.4 milestone document) said
   'v0.4 final. Ready for distribution.' That was true
   when it was written, but the v0.4.22 cumulative
   release is the current. git mv RELEASE_v0.4.md →
   RELEASE_v0.4.22.md and updated the top status block
   to match the Tauri productVersion. Added a fresh
   [Unreleased] section at the bottom listing the next
   candidates: v0.4.23 (re-cut NSIS with the v0.4.22
   commit hash in the welcome dialog), v0.5 (re-enable
   macOS + Linux bundle targets, NSIS-driven auto-update
   via tauri-plugin-updater).

3. docs/ACCEPTANCE_v0.3_stage_{a,c}.txt were the v0.3
   acceptance runs. v0.3 is now superseded by v0.4.22
   (and the authoritative acceptance is
   docs/ACCEPTANCE_v0.4.md). git rm'd both files; the
   600-line delta is gone from main.

4. docs/ARCHITECTURE.md was tagged 'v0.3 RFC' but was
   still in main as if it were current architecture
   (the per-crate READMEs are the real v0.4.22
   architecture reference, not this file). Added a top
   block noting that this file is a frozen v0.3 snapshot
   and pointing readers at the per-crate READMEs for
   the as-built v0.4.22 architecture. Marked 'Active
   (frozen at v0.3, kept for historical reference)'.
   history/PROJECT_SPEC.md was tagged 'v0.1 RFC' (the
   founding design for the project) but was sitting in
   main as if it were current spec. Same treatment:
   added a 'founding RFC; superseded by docs/ARCHITECTURE
   v0.3 + per-crate READMEs' block at the top. The v0.4.22
   RFC itself is a candidate event 000080 — out of
   scope here.

5. .nwt/timeline/000061.json is missing (the timeline
   goes 000060 → 000062). The chairman did not select
   '补 NWT 000061' from the menu, so this is left
   for a future event. The gap likely corresponds to
   the brief 2026-07-02 pre-tarot-incident interval
   where multiple smaller fixes were absorbed into
   the 000060 / 000062 events without a dedicated entry.

6. .gitignore was already covering `.gradle/` (item 6
   on the menu). No action needed.

NET: four docs/CHANGELOG/RELEASE changes + two file
moves (RELEASE rename, history/PROJECT_SPEC.md /
docs/ARCHITECTURE.md version headers) + two docs
removals (ACCEPTANCE_v0.3_stage_a.txt / stage_c.txt).
No code touched, no runtime touched, no APK rebuilt.
This is a pure-repo-maintenance pass.

FILES TOUCHED:
- CHANGELOG.md
- RELEASE_v0.4.md → RELEASE_v0.4.22.md (git mv + content
  edits)
- docs/ACCEPTANCE_v0.3_stage_a.txt (deleted)
- docs/ACCEPTANCE_v0.3_stage_c.txt (deleted)
- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md (header block added)
- history/PROJECT_SPEC.md (header block added)
- .nwt/timeline/000079.json (this file)
reason: Chairman: '根据检查的问题继续维护仓库' (continue maintaining the repo per the issues found). Five maintenance items addressed: catch CHANGELOG up to 0.4.22, rename RELEASE_v0.4.md to v0.4.22, drop v0.3 acceptance files, clarify v0.3 RFC and v0.1 RFC provenance. Item 5 (000061 NWT gap) and item 6 (.gitignore OK) left for later.
